home.heroBadge: Track prices across Amazon, Walmart & eBay
home.heroDescription: PriceTracker monitors product prices across major e-commerce platforms, alerts you on drops, and gives you the data you need to buy at the perfect moment.
home.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Track Prices
home.featuresSubtitle: A complete toolkit for monitoring prices, analyzing trends, and never missing a deal.
home.feature1Desc: Monitor product prices across Amazon, Walmart, and eBay from a single dashboard. Add any product URL and we handle the rest.
home.feature2Desc: Visualize price trends over time with interactive charts. Identify the best time to buy based on historical data.
home.feature3Desc: Set price drop thresholds or target prices. Get notified instantly via email when conditions are met.
home.feature4Desc: Track competitor pricing for the same products. Compare seller ratings, shipping costs, and price changes side by side.
home.feature5Desc: Prices are checked automatically at your chosen frequency — hourly, daily, or weekly. No manual refreshing needed.
home.feature6Desc: Redis-powered caching ensures lightning-fast page loads even when tracking hundreds of products.
home.howSubtitle: Four simple steps from adding a product to saving money.
home.step1Desc: Paste product URLs from Amazon, Walmart, or eBay. We automatically extract pricing information.
home.step2Desc: Our scheduler scrapes prices at regular intervals and builds a complete price history for each product.
home.step3Desc: Define price drop percentages or target prices. Get email notifications the moment your conditions are met.
home.step4Desc: Review trends, compare competitors, and buy at the lowest price. Data-driven purchasing decisions.
home.plansSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
home.ctaDescription: Join PriceTracker and never miss a price drop again. Set up in under a minute.

register.title: Create your account
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

products.title: Products
products.noProducts: No products found. Add your first product to start tracking prices.
products.removeDescription: This will permanently delete the product and all its associated price history. This action cannot be undone.

competitors.title: Competitors
competitors.noCompetitors: No competitors added yet. Track competitor prices by adding entries here.
competitors.removeDescription: This will permanently delete the competitor entry. This action cannot be undone.
competitors.lockedDescription: Competitor tracking is not included in your current plan. Upgrade to access this feature.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.noAlerts: No alerts yet. Create a price alert to get notified when prices change.

tracking.title: Price Tracking
tracking.noTracking: No items being tracked. Start tracking a product to monitor price changes.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.switchDescription: You are about to switch to the {{plan}} plan. Your current plan benefits will be updated immediately.

categories.title: Categories
categories.noCategories: No categories yet. Add categories to organize your products.
categories.removeDescription: This will permanently delete the category. Products using it will keep their current category text. This action cannot be undone.
